name: Triple Cheese Pasta with Green Peas
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Italian fontina cheese, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mash the Gorgonzola and butter.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the mozzarella, Fontina, olive oil, and pepper.
3. Steam the peas over moderate heat in a steamer rack until tender (5-7 minutes). Alternatively, cook the peas in the microwave for 3-4 minutes until done.
4. Cook the Rotelle pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water until tender but still firm to the bite (5-7 minutes), then drain well.
5. In a warmed bowl, melt the Gorgonzola and butter mixture. Add the cooked pasta and peas; toss to coat well.
6. Sprinkle with chives, add the mozzarella and Fontina mixture, and toss again. Season with salt and additional pepper to taste.
